summary: Tested Phase 1 credibility fixes for barrister feedback. All features verified working: strength badge labels changed to 'Arguable — Strong/Moderate' and 'Requires Development', law sections with 'not provided' filtered out, similar cases with placeholders filtered out, 'Comparable Authority' heading in print view, per-ground disclaimer in print view. Fixed single ground export to use consistent filtering and heading.

minor.issue: Backend returns raw data including placeholder similar cases (e.g. 'R v [Surname] [Year]'). This is by design - filtering happens on frontend. Existing grounds created with old prompts retain old data until re-identified.

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Single ground export (buildSingleGroundHtml) now uses 'Comparable Authority' heading instead of 'Similar Cases (AI-Suggested)'
Fixed: Single ground export now filters law sections with 'not provided' or 'unknown'
Fixed: Single ground export now filters similar cases with placeholder names
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 credibility fixes verified. STRENGTH_CONFIG labels changed from Strong/Moderate/Weak to 'Arguable — Strong'/'Arguable — Moderate'/'Requires Development'. Frontend filters out law sections with 'not provided'/'unknown' and similar cases with '[Surname]'/'[Year]' placeholders. Print view uses 'Comparable Authority' heading and includes per-ground disclaimer. Existing grounds in database may have old data - new fields (appellate_pathway, error_identified, materiality) only populate on re-identification.

law_sections_filtering.details: Frontend filters out law sections where section contains 'not provided', 'unknown', or is empty. Verified in grounds list, detail dialog, and print view.

similar_cases_filtering.details: Frontend filters out similar cases with '[Surname]', '[Year]' placeholders, 'Case name', 'None', 'optional', or citations containing 'verification needed'.

comparable_authority_heading.details: Print/PDF view uses 'Comparable Authority' heading instead of 'Similar Cases (AI-Suggested)'. Single ground export also updated.

per_ground_disclaimer.details: Print/PDF view shows disclaimer after each ground: 'This analysis identifies potential appellate issues based on available material. It does not determine that the appeal will succeed. All grounds require refinement and verification by a qualified legal practitioner.'

appellate_pathway_field.details: Field exists in IssueClassification model and is populated by classify.py. Existing grounds don't have this field - only appears after re-identification. Frontend displays blue box when field is present.

backend_api_grounds.details: GET /api/cases/{case_id}/grounds returns 200 with grounds array, count, is_unlocked, unlock_price

backend_api_auto_identify.details: POST /api/cases/{case_id}/grounds/auto-identify returns task_id and status (started/already_running). GET /status returns task progress.
